key_insights.insight: To create viral content, you need to create something that's never been done before; it has to have the 'purple cow' effect.
key_insights.quote: To go viral, you have to do something that's never been done before... there are ideas that are like the purple cow idea, which is what I try to do, which are things that make you go, what the fuck?

key_insights.insight: Obsessing over a problem more than anyone else gives you a competitive advantage in finding innovative solutions.
key_insights.quote: I'm really good at just obsessing over one thing more than anyone else on the planet. If I were to say, what's my superpower? It's that I can just obsess endlessly about something and I can just have the same thoughts over and over and over again.

key_insights.insight: It's better to focus on producing a few exponential hits than spreading efforts thinly across many mediocre attempts.
key_insights.quote: If your shit's very exponential, it's way easier to get 50 million views on one video than it is to get a million views on 50 videos.

key_insights.insight: Ethical sourcing, although difficult, can be achieved even at scale and profitability, it's a matter of priorities and proving the model.
key_insights.quote: What we need to do is we need to, in my head, get to a billion dollars a year in revenue as fast as possible while being ethically sourced and being profitable.

key_insights.insight: One of the most important jobs as a leader is to make sure your great people are working with other great people.
key_insights.quote: That's one of your number one jobs as a leader is just to make sure your great people are working with other great people. Because that's like, the number one reason why people leave jobs isn't money. You know what I mean? It's like number four on the list.

key_insights.insight: Prioritize your core offering above all else, if that is suffering, everything will suffer.
key_insights.quote: If I don't film, there is no content. Like the channel just literally ceases.

key_insights.insight: It is important to know what your own values and ethics are and stick to them.
key_insights.quote: So I just came to the point where I just have to have my own internal guidelines of do I think what I'm doing is good, do what I think is moral, ethical, do I believe in what I'm doing? If so, fuck it.

key_insights.insight: To truly lead innovation, you have to intimately understand every facet of your business, even the mundane.
key_insights.quote: If I want to lead real innovation and like change the industry, then I got to know every little facet of everything.

actionable_advice.advice: Build a team of 'A players' and remove mediocre performers, even if they are not overtly bad.
actionable_advice.how_to: Rigorously evaluate team performance and cultural fit, prioritize surrounding top performers with other top performers, and address any negative impact on team morale or productivity swiftly.

actionable_advice.advice: Use 'After Action Reports' to analyze mistakes and ensure they aren't repeated.
actionable_advice.how_to: After any significant project or video launch, gather the smartest people on the team, analyze data (retention, CTR, etc.), and articulate what went wrong and what was done well. Document the findings to prevent future errors.

actionable_advice.advice: Frame challenges as unique opportunities that others are unwilling to face.
actionable_advice.how_to: When facing hardship, remind yourself that this struggle is what sets you apart and prevents others from achieving the same level of success.

actionable_advice.advice: Focus on batching similar tasks to minimise mental gear switching.
actionable_advice.how_to: Schedule similar tasks together in blocks to reduce the need for constant context switching, allowing for deeper focus and improved productivity.

actionable_advice.advice: If you are in a place where you don't fit in, change your environment
actionable_advice.how_to: If you are in a negative environment, seek a new environment

memorable_stories: Putting hidden GoPros in Walmart stores to analyze why Feastables bars were breaking.
Spending a week in West Africa following the entire cocoa bean-to-bar process to ensure ethical sourcing.
Driving from DC to North Carolina, stopping at every Walmart along the way to check on chocolate product placement.
contrarian_claims: Helping people can actually decrease your likability on the internet.
Mental health can't be your number one priority if you are successful.
Prioritize your own ethics over whatever the Internet is saying.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - MrBeast: If You Want To Be Liked, Don't Help People! I Lost Tens Of Millions On Beast Games... But I'm Worth $1 Billion!
